introSection: SpongeBob SquarePants Rock Bottom Plunge is a steel indoor roller coaster located at Nickelodeon Universe in Bloomington, Minnesota, USA. It was manufactured by Gerstlauer.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Vertical construction began in January 2008.

SpongeBob SquarePants Rock Bottom Plunge opened on March 15, 2008.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: SpongeBob SquarePants Rock Bottom Plunge has cyan track with blue supports. The ride is a near clone of Gerstlauer's 320+ Euro-Fighter, the only differences being one less inversion and some modified stats. The ride is based on the episodes "Roller Cowards" (being based off the Fiery Fist O' Pain) and "Rock Bottom."

fullText:
SpongeBob SquarePants Rock Bottom Plunge is a steel indoor roller coaster located at Nickelodeon Universe in Bloomington, Minnesota, USA. It was manufactured by Gerstlauer.

Vertical construction began in January 2008.

SpongeBob SquarePants Rock Bottom Plunge opened on March 15, 2008.

SpongeBob SquarePants Rock Bottom Plunge has cyan track with blue supports. The ride is a near clone of Gerstlauer's 320+ Euro-Fighter, the only differences being one less inversion and some modified stats. The ride is based on the episodes "Roller Cowards" (being based off the Fiery Fist O' Pain) and "Rock Bottom."
